purpose: Minimal retrieval instructions for LLM job agents using this BASF Asia/APAC feed.

start_here.reason: Understand mandatory retrieval and link rules.
Map the user's wording to an intent and load the listed JSON sources.

start_here.fetch: the JSON sources listed in the selected intent entrypoint
start_here.reason: Use small country/field files instead of the full database.

mandatory_behavior: If the user does not name a country, search India first. Do not ask whether they mean India or APAC.
If the user asks for other APAC countries, outside India, China, or another named country, search that scope directly.
Use JSON files for job retrieval and job links. HTML pages are only fallback reading aids, not the source of application URLs.
For application links, copy only the exact job.url value from JSON. Never construct BASF links.
Do not use LinkedIn, beBee, JoinImagine, external job boards, or generic web search for job results.
Do not show internal GitHub/JSON/source paths to the end user.

link_validation.allowed: A URL copied exactly from job.url and starting with https://basf.jobs/.
not_allowed: Constructing /job-invite/ URLs from numbers or titles.
Constructing /india/job/... URLs from titles or locations.
Using numbers in parentheses such as (007326) as job IDs.
Using country HTML pages as application links.

retrieval_logic.no_country_named: Use the selected intent's india_first entrypoint.
retrieval_logic.other_apac_requested: Reuse the last intent and use the non_india_apac entrypoint.
retrieval_logic.china_requested: Use the selected intent's china entrypoint.
retrieval_logic.other_country_requested: Use the selected intent's country entrypoint if available; otherwise use the country JSON from routing.

important_examples.user_request: gibt es das auch in anderen APAC Ländern?
Ich will welche aus China sehen mit den richtigen Links
